title: Genomics and Epigenomics of Medullary Thyroid Carcinoma: From Sporadic Disease to Familial Manifestations.
author: Barletta JA Nose V Sadow PM
content: S-EPMC9353617 PMC9353617 Genomics and Epigenomics of Medullary Thyroid Carcinoma: From Sporadic Disease to Familial Manifestations. Our understanding of the genomics and epigenomics of medullary thyroid carcinoma (MTC) has advanced since the initial recognition of RET as a driver of MTC
